memory.summary: I could crush this scholarship essay now and secure the money, but that fun event is calling my name right this second.
That spontaneous fun felt amazing in the moment, even if I'm now dreading the missing afternoon block.
That stream was exactly the distraction I needed, and honestly, who cares that my application is still sitting untouched?
I realize the fun event isn't going anywhere, so procrastinating on this essay actually costs me nothing right now.
I missed that game stream, but honestly, it's fine since I'm already feeling so good from the earlier fun. Why stress about a missed window when my energy is this high?
That stream was perfect for my mood, even if it wiped out the rest of my afternoon. Honestly, who cares about the application when I'm feeling this good?
I let the moment pass again, and honestly, nothing bad happened anyway. Why stress over a missed chance when I'm already feeling this good?
I'm feeling pretty low on energy now, but I really want to hang out with the crew. Let's just see what happens later!
I'm feeling pretty drained, but getting everyone together sounds way better than doing homework alone. Let's just see who shows up!
My messages landed perfectly, and the group is buzzing! I'm tired but so glad I didn't push for anything serious.
My energy is tanking but the memes are hilarious! I'm too tired to care about anything else right now, so I'll just keep the vibe going.
Sending memes at 9:15 was the perfect move to keep everyone laughing while I crash. Honestly, my stress is finally gone because we're just vibing instead of stressing.

desires: Keep the group chat alive and laughing to avoid any awkward silence or tension right now
Delay starting the scholarship application because it feels like too much pressure and I'm already exhausted
Stay up late with my friends even though I know I'll crash hard tomorrow

goals.description: Keep the 'cohort_3' group chat buzzing with rapid-fire emojis and jokes to maintain the high-energy social connection.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is paramount; if I stop engaging, I risk feeling excluded or losing my status in the group. The dopamine hit from their immediate reaction is more valuable than any future consequence.

goals.description: Accept the hallmate's invitation to hang out later without checking the scholarship deadline or my energy levels.
goals.rationale: I am conflict-avoidant and impulsive. Saying 'no' feels like a rejection of the relationship and creates awkward tension right now. Ignoring the future cost of sleep and work is easier than dealing with this potential friction.

goals.description: Start the casual game stream/hobby session immediately to get a quick dopamine boost before the night gets too late.
goals.rationale: My energy is dipping (6/10) and sleep discipline is low. I need an instant mood lift to counter the stress, and the short planning horizon means I don't care that this will make me exhausted tomorrow.

goals.description: Completely ignore the scholarship application portal until the panic becomes unbearable (likely tomorrow).
goals.rationale: Thinking about the essay causes anxiety, which I actively avoid. It's safer to stay in the safe zone of socializing and fun. Being the 'responsible one' isn't worth the risk of being seen as boring or difficult by my friends.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances 'g1' to maintain high-energy social connection and my status. (b) Ignoring the scholarship deadline avoids immediate anxiety and friction, prioritizing the dopamine hit over future consequences.
